mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role_permission SET deleted = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, status, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, 1, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.perm_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.deleted = 0 AND rp.status = 1 INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.deleted = 0 AND ur.status = 1 ORDER BY p.perm_code
